visual_summary: HeroLiquidMetal is a hero component that uses a liquid metal design pattern. It can be used to create a visually appealing and eye-catching hero section in a web application. Developers would use this component to showcase key information and draw attention to important messaging.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready hero component with the following characteristics:

Name: hero-liquid-metal-demo
Description: HeroLiquidMetal is a hero component that uses a liquid metal design pattern. It can be used to create a visually appealing and eye-catching hero section in a web application. Developers would use this component to showcase key information and draw attention to important messaging.
Style: liquid-metal, animated
Interactions: hover, clickable
Tags: hero, liquid-metal, marketing, key-infol

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
